name: Sausage Bean Quickie
recipeIngredient: 6 cooked brown 'n serve sausage links, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 16 oz cans red kidney beans, or
1 7 oz can pineapple chunks in juice, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sausage, vinegar, beans, and pineapple in a Crock-Pot.
2. Mix the brown sugar with the flour and add to the mixture; stir well.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 10 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours.
4. Serves 4.
